headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Edwards Lifesciences, Raises Price Target to $104
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Joshua Jennings   maintains Edwards Lifesciences (NYSE:EW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $97 to $104.
